title: MCA Revamp
description: The modpack as used in the official MCA Reborn community server, but a solid and lite-weight pack on its own as well.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kgQZsYc8/images/a2c4cbbb77fc133bc18f55bf8890c55faa57b195.png)

This modpack is designed for the **MCA Community SMP**, which you are welcome to join via our **Discord server: https://discord.gg/9ehh8hMzc5**

Of course it will also work just fine for your server. With a focus on performance and overall vanilla faithful content, it is a fun and lite modpack.


## ➤ Performance First

Filled to the brim with performance mods, memory leak fixers, start-up speedups and multi-threading, it is designed to support your grandmas PC from 2007, despite Minecraft 1.20.1's increase in processing requirements. The modpack is continuously profiled, and laggy mods fixed or removed.

## ➤ Quality

Iris, ambient sounds, presence footsteps, drip sounds and realistic sound physics are used to give the overall immersion a level up.

## ➤ Vanilla but More

A community SMP attracts all kind of people, from beginners to veterans, thus an overloaded modpack would not make much sense. Therefore, it is a carefully upgraded vanilla feeling, with classics like Farmer's delight, Supplementaries and the Immersive Collection. Chipped and Rechiseled make sure you never run out of building blocks. Many smaller mods add all those things which should have been in Minecraft from the start.

## ➤ Server Orientated

And since servers tend to go up in flames easily, helpful tools are included as well. Voice chat, chunk claiming, waypoints, and spark ensures easier management and less angry players.

## ➤ Backwards Compatible

Mods change, but the world shall not. All future updates of this modpack, including new mods, are designed to keep damage to existing worlds small, with no ugly chunk borders or holes in your world.
